_**Agent (model default, mode Agent)**_

<think><details><summary>Thought Process</summary>

The user wants to add two input fields to the Moco integration component so that users can save and change the API key and subdomain directly in the UI, instead of only configuring them via the .env file. Let me find the Moco component first.
</details></think>
